description.value:
**Benefit:** Add plane shift to your spell list and to your spellbook as a 5th-level wizard spell. The time required for you to identify a portalâs destination is reduced to 1 round. In addition, you automatically identify any plane on which you arrive.

**Normal:** Plane shift is a 7th-level wizard spell.

**Special:** A wizard can select this as a wizard bonus feat.
